last_response_preview:
Hook working. Session 654 wrapped up.

**What was done:**
- Installed global `prepare-commit-msg` hook at `~/.git-hooks/` — rewrites co-author trailer on every commit in every repo
- Set `git config --global core.hooksPath ~/.git-hooks/`
- Added repo-local hook chaining so pi-mono's husky pre-commit keeps firing
- Checked all repos — pi-mono is the only one with active hooks

**Risk: YELLOW** — 5 uncommitted files remain (settings.json, tool_profiles, skills.db, etc.) — these are runtime state,
